bioacousticModelHelp: Bioacoustic models are selected based on the taxa they are able to classify. Some models are available in the registry and the user can also add custom models in the advanced settings section below.
confidenceHelp: This parameter relates to the output score of the model which ranges between 0 and 1. Any detection with score below this threshold is ignored.
overlapHelp: This parameter corresponds to the percentage of overlap between analysis windows within the observation sound. Each model has its own specific analysis window duration.
customModelHelp: The user is able to add a custom model by providing all model properties following the JSON format below.
setLanguageHelp: Select a language for the extension. This configuration will be saved in cache
coordNotFound: Could not find coordinates for this observation.
fetchGBIFError: Could not fetch GBIF range for
withinGBIF: ✓ Within GBIF bounding box for this species
outsideGBIF: ⚠ Outside GBIF bounding box for this species
endOfAnalysis: End of Analysis for this sound.
cacheNotFound: Cache not found or already empty.
